misc: Has a habit of getting lost on golf course grounds
Does not spit in the glass
biography: Janne, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is set to make his ninth appearance at the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. Representing Revontuli Golf, Janne is known for his generous spirit and unwavering commitment to the game.

Beyond the greens, Janne is a man of peculiar habits, most notably his tendency to become disoriented within the golf course grounds. His fellow players often joke about Janne's adventurous detours, though they always ensure he finds his way back to the game.

Off the course, Janne is known for his impeccable manners. A true gentleman, Janne adheres to a strict code of conduct, reflected in his firm stance against spitting in the glass. While he has yet to capture either the Hector Trophée or the Victor Trophy, Janne's presence and sportsmanship make him a valued participant in the tournament.
